name: Bing China MCP Server
what_it_does: Bing China MCP server enabling AI agents to search the web using Microsoft Bing — querying Bing's search index for web results, news, and images, returning structured search results with titles, URLs, and snippets, and integrating Bing search into agent-driven research workflows as an alternative to Google Search.
use_cases: Searching the web via Bing from research agents
Retrieving current news and web results from monitoring agents
Getting search results accessible in China from China-based agents
Finding web content as an alternative to Google from privacy-aware agents
Combining search results from multiple providers from redundancy agents
Research and fact-checking from assistant agents
not_for: Teams already using Serper or Brave Search (overlap in functionality)
Academic search (use Google Scholar MCP for scholarly results)
AI-synthesized search results (raw Bing results only)
best_when: An agent needs Bing search results — particularly useful where Google is blocked (China), or when Bing's different index provides alternative perspectives on queries.
avoid_when: You already have Serper or Brave Search integrated and don't specifically need Bing's search index.

auth.notes: Bing Search API key required from Azure Cognitive Services. Bing Custom Search or Bing Web Search API. Azure subscription needed for API key.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Bing Search API: 1,000 queries/month free (F0 tier)
pricing.notes: Bing Search API requires Azure subscription and credit card. F0 free tier provides 1,000 free queries/month. Community MCP server is free.

performance.rate_limits: Bing API: up to 250 calls/second on paid tiers

known_agent_gotchas: Azure subscription required — not straightforward for non-Azure users
Credit card required even for free tier setup via Azure
Bing API is being retired in some regions — verify current availability
Community MCP (3a3del) — not official Microsoft MCP; verify Bing API compatibility
Bing Custom Search (CSE) vs Bing Web Search API are different endpoints — confirm which
Search results quality differs from Google — may need query adjustments
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. Azure API key auth. GDPR, SOC2 compliant. Community MCP. Store API key as environment variable. Restrict Azure resource to Bing Search only.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. Azure key auth. GDPR, SOC2. Community MCP. Store key securely.
